name: Anthropia || Feline Law
description:
Dead Dove for general violence, possible gore, snuff, police brutality, etc
After a bit of thorough testing i decided to put it out. This one is not perfect at all and might even be a bit broken, will fix.
Feline Law passed in Anthropia. That means literally any feline anthro is nothing more than an item, a food to be prepared and served on a platter, a toy, a pet. You just so happen to live there, or work, or whatever.
Enforce law, hide, or just live your life in this new society.
